details: Developing and maintaining full-stack web applications primarily using React and Node.js (Express).
Managing complex application states using Zustand to optimize frontend performance.
Designing and optimizing database queries in SSMS (SQL Server) for enterprise-level applications.
Efficiently integrating frontend components with backend APIs and contributing to scalable system architecture.
Developed high-performance landing pages for Tastematter, Sauce, and Maincourse.
Built and maintained web projects using Nuxt 3, Tailwind CSS, and Yup for robust data validation.
Integrated payment gateways including Stripe.js and Omise to support e-commerce transactions.
Enhanced internal API workflows and developed backend services using Node.js and MongoDB.
Engineered and maintained core web applications utilizing React.js, Redux, and Tailwind CSS.
Served as a QA Tester, creating comprehensive test scripts for Microsoft Dynamics 365 (AX).
QUEQ Team: Developed hospital queue management admin apps and reporting dashboards with Nuxt.js and Ant Design.
Daywork Team: Implemented real-time chat features using Firebase and WebSocket protocols.
Deeploy Team: Built online ticket booking platforms for National Park entrepreneurs using Nuxt.js and Element UI.
Acquired fundamental knowledge in web architecture and UX/UI design principles.
Practiced using web development tools and understood real-world workflows in a digital agency environment.
